hackathons_cover_image_storage_check.name: hackathons_cover_image_storage_check
hackathons_cover_image_storage_check.value: (cover_image_path is null and cover_image_fetched_at is null) or (nullif(btrim(cover_image_path), '') is not null and cover_image_fetched_at is not null)

hacker_contributor_metrics_identity_chec.name: hacker_contributor_metrics_identity_check
hacker_contributor_metrics_identity_chec.value:
"private"."hacker_contributor_metrics"."github_user_id" > 0
          and nullif(btrim("private"."hacker_contributor_metrics"."github_login"), '') is not null
          and nullif(btrim("private"."hacker_contributor_metrics"."display_name"), '') is not null

hacker_insight_runs_lifecycle_check.name: hacker_insight_runs_lifecycle_check
hacker_insight_runs_lifecycle_check.value:
(
          ("private"."hacker_insight_runs"."status" = 'queued' and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."started_at" is null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."completed_at" is null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."error_detail" is null)
          or ("private"."hacker_insight_runs"."status" = 'running' and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."started_at" is not null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."completed_at" is null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."error_detail" is null)
          or ("private"."hacker_insight_runs"."status" = 'succeeded' and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."started_at" is not null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."completed_at" is not null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."error_detail" is null)
          or ("private"."hacker_insight_runs"."status" = 'failed' and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."started_at" is not null and "private"."hacker_insight_runs"."completed_at" is not null and nullif(btrim("private"."hacker_insight_runs"."error_detail"), '') is not null)
        )

indexing_requests_destination_path_check.name: indexing_requests_destination_path_check
indexing_requests_destination_path_check.value: destination_path is null or destination_path like '/hackathons/%'

indexing_requests_progress_nonnegative_c.name: indexing_requests_progress_nonnegative_check
indexing_requests_progress_nonnegative_c.value: progress_completed >= 0 and (progress_total is null or progress_total >= 0)

indexing_requests_progress_bounds_check.name: indexing_requests_progress_bounds_check
indexing_requests_progress_bounds_check.value: progress_total is null or progress_completed <= progress_total

project_embedding_sources_nonblank_check.name: project_embedding_sources_nonblank_check
project_embedding_sources_nonblank_check.value:
nullif(btrim("private"."project_embedding_sources"."inspiration"), '') is not null
          and nullif(btrim("private"."project_embedding_sources"."what_it_does"), '') is not null

projects_winner_track_check.name: projects_winner_track_check
projects_winner_track_check.value: ("projects"."is_winner" and nullif(btrim("projects"."winning_track"), '') is not null) or (not "projects"."is_winner" and "projects"."winning_track" is null)

repository_commit_authors_github_identit.name: repository_commit_authors_github_identity_check
